response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering fundamentals and exceeds total years of experience, this role requires a C++ specialist in industrial automation. His last significant C++ work was 2014–2015; his recent 4+ years have focused on full-stack TypeScript/Node.js development. He lacks the industrial IoT domain knowledge, security compliance expertise (SDL, IEC 62443), and systems-level experience (message brokers, MQTT, embedded protocols) the role demands. A technically strong engineer, but a poor fit for this position.
strengths: Substantially exceeds total experience requirement (18+ years vs. 8–12) with proven track record in distributed systems and high-performance backends
Demonstrates strong software engineering discipline: TDD advocate, clean architecture, mentorship across multiple technical domains, and open-source contributions
Highly adaptable across multiple languages and platforms, suggesting capacity to learn new stacks—though not immediately applicable to C++-focused role
concerns: C++ expertise is severely outdated; last professional C++ work was National Instruments (2014–2015). Most recent 4+ years focused exclusively on TypeScript, Node.js, and web infrastructure

Zero demonstrated experience in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or security compliance (SDL, IEC 62443, secure SDLC). No mention of message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, DNP 3.0, OPC UA)
Recent career trajectory diverges sharply from role requirements; moves from systems programming toward full-stack web and AI agent frameworks, not toward the C++/embedded/IoT specialization needed
